{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task status tracking and filtering to task list.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status persistence with pending default",
      "description": "As a product team, I want each task to store a status value so that task state persists and existing records default to pending.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add `status` field to task storage with allowed values `pending`, `in_progress`, and `done`",
        "Existing tasks are backfilled to `pending` and new tasks default to `pending`",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/*add-task-status*",
        "src/db/schema/tasks.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Implement backend task status update action",
      "description": "As a user, I want status changes saved so that task progress updates persist.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Provide backend action or endpoint to update task status by task id",
        "Reject unsupported status values with validation errors",
        "Persist status changes and return updated task payload",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/tasks/*",
        "src/api/tasks/*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show task status badge on task cards",
      "description": "As a user, I want each task card to show a status badge so that I can scan progress quickly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards render status badge for pending, in_progress, and done",
        "Badge text is distinct for each status",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/tasks/TaskCard.*",
        "src/components/tasks/StatusBadge.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add task-row status control",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change a task status from task list rows so that updates are fast.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task rows include status selector with pending, in_progress, and done options",
        "Changing selector triggers backend status update and refreshes row state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/tasks/TaskListRow.*",
        "src/hooks/tasks/*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Filter task list by status",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter tasks by status so that I can focus on pending, in-progress, or done work.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list has filter options All, Pending, In Progress, and Done",
        "Selected filter limits visible tasks to matching status",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/tasks/TaskFilters.*",
        "src/components/tasks/TaskList.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add membership audit-log persistence",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want membership changes stored as audit events so that admin actions are traceable.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Create membership audit-log storage with actor, target member, action, and timestamp fields",
        "Store event types for invite_sent, role_changed, and access_revoked",

      "notes": ""

      "title": "Invite workspace members by email",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to invite members by email so that new collaborators can join safely.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can submit a valid email and selected role (viewer, editor, admin) to create invitation",

      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can change member role between viewer, editor, and admin",
        "Successful role change updates membership and writes role_changed audit event",

        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"

        "src/server/workspace/members/updateRole*",

        "Admins can revoke access for existing workspace member",
